ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "no_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "no_of_bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "flat_area_sqft" INTEGER /* Flat area of the property in square feet */,
  "lot_area_sqft" INTEGER /* Lot area of the property in square feet */,
  "no_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "no_of_times_visited" INTEGER /* Number of times the property has been visited */,
  "overall_grade" INTEGER /* Overall grade of the property */,
  "area_from_basement_sqft" INTEGER /* Area of the house from the basement in square feet */,
  "basement_area_sqft" INTEGER /* Basement area of the property in square feet */,
  "age_of_house_years" INTEGER /* Age of the house in years */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "living_area_renovated_sqft" INTEGER /* Living area of the property after renovation in square feet */,
  "lot_area_renovated_sqft" INTEGER /* Lot area of the property after renovation in square feet */,
  "years_since_renovation" INTEGER /* Number of years since the property was last renovated */,
  "ever_renovated" INTEGER /* Whether the property has ever been renovated (1 if true, 0 if false) */,
  "waterfront_view" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a waterfront view (1 if true, 0 if false) */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property type */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "heating_system" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "garage_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can accommodate */,
  "hoa_fees" REAL /* Monthly Homeowners Association (HOA) fees */,
  "hoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the HOA */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Annual property tax */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code of the property */,
  "construction_material" TEXT /* Material used in construction */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Architectural style of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the zip code group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zip code group */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the zip code is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zip code is located */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the zip code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zip code */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Excellent, Fair, Good, Okay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the condition (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor (agent or potential buyer) */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the visit */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the visitor (e.g., agent, buyer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the visitor */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits made by the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renovations" (
  "renovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renovation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being renovated */,
  "renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the renovation */,
  "renovation_cost" REAL /* Cost of the renovation */,
  "living_area_renovated_sqft" INTEGER /* Living area of the property renovated in square feet */,
  "lot_area_renovated_sqft" INTEGER /* Lot area of the property renovated in square feet */,
  "renovator_name" TEXT /* Name of the renovator */,
  "renovation_type" TEXT /* Type of renovation (e.g., kitchen, bathroom) */,
  "renovation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the renovation */,
  "permit_number" TEXT /* Permit number for the renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renovation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renovations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., single-family, multi-family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties of this type */,
  "average_size" INTEGER /* Average size of properties of this type in square feet */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., exterior, interior, floor plan) */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
